body: Suresh, aapne corporate bulk thali package ke baare mein socha tha — let's make it happen! 12,400 views and 88 calls in 30 days dikha rahe hain ki demand hai. Ek suggestion: Weekday Lunch Thali @ ₹149 per cover, minimum 20 covers, free delivery. Isko is week hi live karte hain? Reply YES to proceed.
rationale: Instant expert help lever — momentum while merchant is engaged, with a concrete offer draft based on their intent and last message.

body: Padma, your kids yoga summer camp idea is solid — let's get it live this week. Your studio's 880 views and 18 calls show strong footfall potential. How about a 'Summer Splits' program: 4-week batch, 2 PT sessions/week, ₹2,499 with a free body composition analysis? Reply YES to launch.
rationale: Instant expert help lever: provides a concrete offer draft to maintain momentum while the merchant is actively planning, using their intent and recent engagement data.

body: Aditya, kal aapka appointment confirm hai Karim's Salon, Alambagh mein. Aapki 756 views se 2 calls aaye hain — kya aap balayage ya hair spa add karna chahenge?
rationale: Relevant insight (views vs calls) creates urgency to upsell, and quick win (add service) feels easy to act on.

body: Riya, aapka kal Beauty Lounge by Renu, Gomti Nagar mein appointment confirm hai. Kya aap apne saath koi naya balayage ya highlights try karna chahengi? Humari 2945 views hain aur CTR 5.1% hai — Lucknow mein kaafi pasand kiye ja rahe hain. Batao kya plan hai?
rationale: Relevant insight (appointment tomorrow) + quick win (offer to try balayage/highlights) creates urgency and personal touch for Riya.

body: Ramesh, summer demand is here — antifungal +45%, ORS +40% in Jaipur. Aapki pharmacy mein OTC stock kaise hai? Schedule H items ka expiry check karein. Peak demand is NOW — act this week before stock runs short. Shelf action: Boost ORS, sunscreen, and antifungal shelf visibility; reduce cold-cough front shelf space this week. Reply YES to prepare shelf now.
rationale: Specific demand numbers create urgency, and the shelf action recommendation gives a concrete step, leveraging the seasonal trigger to drive immediate action.

body: Meera ji, IDA Delhi ka 'Digital impressions — 2026 state of the art' webinar hai — 2 credits milenge, members ke liye free. Aapki CTR 2.1% hai, peer median se thoda neeche — yeh webinar aapki practice ko edge de sakta hai. Reply YES to register.
rationale: Professional edge lever: free CPD credits and latest digital impressions knowledge to improve practice and potentially boost CTR, which is below peer median.

body: Mr. Sharma, Apollo Health Plus Pharmacy here. Aapke metformin, atorvastatin, telmisartan ka stock April 28 tak khatam ho jayega. Hum aapke saved address par free home delivery kar sakte hain (₹499+). Kya hum aapka refill bhej dein? Reply YES.
rationale: Health urgency (stock runs out April 28) + frictionless refill (saved address, free delivery) triggers quick action for chronic patient.

body: Vivaan, Bright Smile Dental here. Your fluoride varnish and scaling treatment are due — stock runs out in 3 days. A quick visit can prevent caries. Reply YES to book your slot.
rationale: Health urgency lever: uses specific treatment names and stock expiry to create timely action, with frictionless YES reply.

body: Dr. Meera, Smile Studio just opened 1.3km away offering Dental Cleaning @ ₹199. Aapne 2018 se 540 patients ki scaling aur treatment ki hai — woh trust koi discount nahi la sakta. Patients say 'Dr. Meera explains everything patiently' — yahi aapki strength hai. Unke ₹199 ke offer ko match karte hue apne existing scaling mein complimentary fluoride varnish add karein — isse aapke loyal patients ko pata chalega ki aap unki zyada care karte hain. Reply YES to start this counter-offer today.
rationale: Threat awareness (competitor opening nearby) combined with social proof (patient review) and a specific defensive action (match offer + add fluoride varnish) creates urgency and leverages trust to prompt immediate action.

body: Suresh, a new competitor just opened nearby in Indiranagar. You've served 4200 patients since 2014 — that's your moat. Regulars say 'thali_quality' is unmatched. Post a 'locals pick' story featuring your top dish — established regulars don't risk a new place when they have a favourite. Reply YES to get a template.
rationale: Threat awareness lever: new competitor triggers urgency, social proof from patient count and thali quality reinforces loyalty, and defensive action gives immediate counter-move.

body: Lakshmi, aapke salon ki calls 62 thi is month — balayage searches +45% badh rahe hain. Batao, is month bridal package ya keratin treatment zyada book ho raha hai? Main usse ek Google post aur WhatsApp reply bana dunga jo aap copy-paste kar sakte ho.
rationale: Reciprocity + low-stakes question: asking for her input and offering immediate value (post + reply) makes her feel heard and likely to respond.

body: Suresh, weekday lunch thali searches up 34% — which dish is topping orders this week? Reply with the name, and I'll turn it into a Google post + a 3-line WhatsApp reply you can copy-paste.
rationale: Reciprocity + low-stakes question: offering a free post and reply in exchange for a simple answer, leveraging the trending signal to make the ask feel timely and valuable.

body: Rashmi, it's been 57 days since your last session at PowerHouse Fitness. We remember your weight loss journey — you were crushing it with 22 visits in 5 months. Your spot in the weekday evening slot is still open. Come back with 3 FREE Trial Classes and let's get that PR again. Reply YES to claim.
rationale: Personal recall of her specific focus and visit count creates a sense of being remembered, while the free trial offer reduces friction to return.

body: Reyansh, Dr. Asha here from Asha Dental Care. Aapne scaling aur fluoride varnish karaya tha — 1 month ho gaya, ab ek quick check-up ka time hai. Kya aapko koi discomfort hai? Naye patients ke liye bhi slot available hai. Reply YES to confirm.
rationale: No-shame re-engagement by acknowledging past service (scaling, fluoride varnish) and offering a new check-up, with a binary YES CTA for easy opt-in.

body: Reyansh, Daily Care Medicos se baat kar rahe hain. Aapko 1 mahine se nahi dekha — kya sab theek hai? Humne naye OTC aur generic options laaye hain jo aapke budget ke hisaab se hain. Is hafte koi bhi slot lein — reply YES karein.
rationale: No-shame re-engagement by acknowledging absence without guilt, highlighting new OTC/generic options to provide new value, and offering a specific time slot with a binary YES CTA.

body: Anjali, bridal season is picking up — keratin aur styling ki demand ab build hona start hoti hai. Aapki listing pe 1200 views aaye, lekin calls sirf 8. Last we were working on your subscription — ek baar active karein to ye bridal traffic capture kar sakte hain. Ready in 60 seconds? Bas haan bolein.
rationale: Fresh business insight (bridal season + keratin demand) as re-opener, anchored with views and calls numbers, and a low-friction CTA to re-engage dormant merchant.

body: Anand, Chai Point Cafe ki weekend covers aur delivery orders sabse zyada ROI dete hain — ek flash combo story se calls 3x badh jaate hain. Aapki 2189 views hain, lekin calls sirf 26. Ready in 60 seconds — just say YES to try a combo story?
rationale: Fresh business insight (weekend covers/combo story ROI) as re-opener, anchored with views and calls numbers to show missed opportunity.

body: Lakshmi, Diwali is 188 days away — bridal bookings fill 4-6 weeks before peak, so abhi se plan karo. Aapke 4980 views and 62 calls dikha rahe hain ki demand strong hai. Bridal packages ke saath keratin ya smoothening add karo — reply karo 'PLAN' to start prep.
rationale: Preparation urgency lever: Diwali countdown creates planning window, bridal booking insight adds ops credibility, and high views/calls validate demand.

body: Pooja, Diwali is 188 days away — perfect time to plan your resolution surge campaign. Your 5,934 views show strong interest, but a focused prep now can lock in those trial walk-ins (4x baseline). Want to brainstorm a split strategy to boost PT sessions and cut membership churn?
rationale: Preparation urgency with ops insight: framing the distant festival as a planning window leverages the merchant's high views to prompt strategic action on retention and PT sessions.

body: Vikas, Sunrise Medicos ki Google listing verify nahi hai — Gomti Nagar ke patients aapko search kar rahe hain par nahi mil rahe. Aapke 720 views hain, lekin verify karne par 30% extra (216 aur) views aa sakte hain. OTC aur schedule H medicines ka stock hai, par visibility waste ho rahi hai. Verification sirf 5 minute ka kaam hai — postcard ya phone se. Reply YES karein to start karein?
rationale: Opportunity cost lever: unverified GBP is wasting 216 potential views per month, quantified with current views and estimated uplift, creating urgency to act.

body: Suresh, aaj Delhi mein DC vs MI match hai Arun Jaitley Stadium pe. Weekend IPL pe dine-in covers usually 12% gir jaate hain, lekin delivery spike hoti hai. Aapka 'Buy 1 Pizza Get 1 Free' offer (Tue-Thu) delivery ke liye perfect hai. Kya aap ise aaj raat delivery mode pe activate karna chahoge? Reply YES to start.
rationale: Counter-intuitive data (dine-in drop vs delivery spike) combined with existing offer leverage to drive the right action for the match.

body: Suresh, aapke 145 reviews ho gaye — sirf 5 aur to hit 150! Peer average 142 hai, aap aage hain. Post a '145 happy diners' story tonight + run a flash combo to tip over 150. Isse footfall aur covers dono badhenge. Reply YES to execute now.
rationale: Social proof momentum lever: almost at 150 reviews, peer comparison shows lead, urgent action to cross milestone and boost footfall.

body: Mukesh, Pizza Spot ne 787 views in 30 days hit kiye! 🎉 Aapka CTR 5.3% hai, jo peer average 142 reviews se better performance dikhata hai. Is momentum ko catch karo: Post a 'happy diners' story tonight + run a flash combo to tip over covers. Reply YES to start!
rationale: Social proof momentum lever: celebrating milestone with specific numbers and peer comparison, then suggesting a compound action to capitalize on the momentum.

body: Bharat, aapke calls 50% gir gaye pichle 7 din mein — sirf 4 calls aayi, jabki peer median 12 hai. Iska matlab 8 patients kam. Periodontal ya scaling ke patients follow-up nahi kar rahe? Ek fluoride varnish offer daal do, 1 post se turnaround aa sakta hai. Reply YES, main draft kar doon?
rationale: Loss aversion by highlighting 50% call drop and 8 fewer patients, anchored to peer median, with a concrete fix (fluoride varnish offer) to recover quickly.

body: Sushma, aapke calls last 7 din mein 0% drop hain — 22 calls, jabki peer median 28 hai. Thoda gap hai, lekin ek hair spa ya smoothening offer post se ise easily cover kar sakte hain. Kya main aapke liye ek draft post bana doon? Reply YES ya NO.
rationale: Loss aversion by highlighting gap with peer median, plus actionable fix of posting an offer to recover calls.

body: Padma, Zen Yoga Studio's calls jumped 15% this week — from 18 to 21 calls. Your kids yoga post is driving this! You're already at peer median (18 calls), so this spike is solid. Want to fill remaining slots by posting a member PR highlight? Reply YES to get a template.
rationale: Positive momentum lever: celebrating the spike and attributing it to a specific driver makes the merchant feel seen and motivated to amplify the success.

body: Vikas, Sunrise Medicos ki views 720 pe stable hain — 0% spike, lekin Gomti Nagar ke peers ka median 1400 hai. Is gap ko close karne ke liye, OTC products jaise ORS ya sunscreen pe focus karein — summer surge mein inki demand badhti hai. Kya aap chahenge ki main aapke top OTC items ki list bana doon? Reply YES ya NO.
rationale: Positive momentum lever: views stable hain lekin peer comparison se gap dikhaya, jisse merchant ko improvement ka motivation mile. OTC category vocab use kiya gaya hai.

body: Priya, Dr. Meera's Dental Clinic here. It's been 6 months since your last visit — your 6-month scaling and fluoride varnish is due. Two slots open: Wed 5 Nov, 6pm or Thu 6 Nov, 5pm. Plus, active offer: Dental Cleaning @ ₹299. Reply 1 for Wed 5 Nov, 6pm, 2 for Thu 6 Nov, 5pm.
rationale: Clinical care continuity lever with specific booking slots and low friction CTA works because Priya is lapsed soft and engaged recently, making a direct slot offer easy to act on.

body: Diya, Zen Yoga Studio here. It's been 6 months since your last visit — your 6-month cleaning recall is ready. Two slots open: Wed 5 Nov, 6pm or Thu 6 Nov, 5pm. Plus, grab our First Month @ ₹499 offer. Reply 1 for Wed 6pm, 2 for Thu 5pm.
rationale: Clinical care continuity lever: using the 6-month recall window and specific slot options to reduce friction for a lapsed customer.

body: Dr. Meera, DCI revised radiograph dose limits effective 2026-12-15. Max IOPA dose drops from 1.5 mSv to 1.0 mSv — E-speed film passes, D-speed does not. Aapke 124 high-risk patients ke records pehle update karne honge. Dec 15 ka window 7 months hai — audit aaj shuru karein, last minute nahi. — Dental Council of India circular 2026-11-04. Reply YES for compliance checklist.
rationale: Patient safety and compliance urgency lever: deadline and high-risk patient count create concrete practice-specific action, driving immediate response.
